name: scanner-mcp
description: Let Claude scan and read paper documents from any USB or network scanner.
long_description:
A generic MCP server that gives Claude a scan tool. It reaches network scanners over the standard eSCL / AirScan / Mopria protocol and USB scanners through the platform driver stack (WIA on Windows, SANE on Linux/macOS, and TWAIN on Windows). Ask Claude to scan a document and the page comes back inline for it to read, or OCR'd to text, or saved as a PDF.

Requires Python 3.10+ with the `scanner-mcp` package installed (`pip install scanner-mcp`).

tools.name: list_scanners
tools.description: Discover network (eSCL/AirScan) and USB (WIA/SANE/TWAIN) scanners reachable from this machine.

tools.name: scan_document
tools.description: Scan a page and return it inline for Claude to read, and/or save it, and/or OCR it to text.

save_dir.title: Save folder
save_dir.description: Where scans are saved. Leave blank to use ~/Scans.

log_level.title: Log level
log_level.description: Logging verbosity: DEBUG, INFO, WARNING, or ERROR.
